titles.title: Constance C. McDaniel Medically Necessary Infant Formula and Donor Milk Act
Constance C. McDaniel Medically Necessary Infant Formula and Donor Milk Act

To direct the Secretary of Health and Human Services to establish a pilot program under which the Secretary provides financial assistance to certain individuals to purchase infant formula, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
